identificationModule.briefTitle: Effects of Levosimendan in Patients Eligible for Aortic Valve Replacement With Left Ventricular Hypertrophy
identificationModule.officialTitle: Effects of Levosimendan on Systolic Deformation and Diastolic Function in Patients Eligible for Aortic Valve Replacement With Left Ventricular Hypertrophy

statusModule.whyStopped: Terminated prematurely due to high incidence of postoperative atrial fibrillation.

descriptionModule.briefSummary: This is a clinical, randomised, double-blinded study in which patients eligible for aortic valve replacement are enrolled. Patients receive infusion of either levosimendan or placebo 4 hours prior to surgery and until the end of surgery.
descriptionModule.detailedDescription:
Levosimendan or placebo will be infusion for approximately 4 hours prior to aortic valve replacement in patients with severe hypertrophy of the left ventricle and echocardiographic signs of diastolic dysfunction. Outcome measures will be obtained at some of the following:

* Approximately 4 hours prior to surgery. Baseline. Start of levosimendan/placebo infusion
* Immediately before surgery
* After induction of anaesthesia and before "knife time" = start of surgery.
* At the end of surgery: Levosimendan infusion will stop.
* Approximately 4 hours after surgery immediately before extubation.
* Approximately 21 hours after surgery
* Approximately 96 hours after surgery (day 4)
* 6 months after surgery

Outcome measures are comprised of invasive measurements, blood samples, transthoracic echocardiography and transoesophageal echocardiography focusing on measures of systolic and diastolic function of the heart.

Interim analysis will be conducted after 30 included patients.

armGroups.label: levosimendan
armGroups.description: infusion 0,1ug/kg/min for duration of ca. 4 hours prior to operation and until the end of operation

interventions.name: levosimendan
interventions.description: Intravenous infusion, 0,1ug/kg/min, duration 4 hours prior to operation and until the end of operation.

interventions.description: Intravenous infusion, colour identical to levosimendan

eligibilityModule.eligibilityCriteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Eligible for aortic valve replacement
* EF \> 45%
* Left ventricular posterior wall \> 12mm
* Sinus rhythm

Exclusion Criteria:

* Concomitant bypass operation
* Severe mitral insufficiency
* Active endocarditis
* Insufficient ultrasound opportunity
* Systolic blood pressure \< 100 mmHg
* moderate-severe renal failure
* allergy to levosimendan
* lack of patient consent Pregnancy or status of lactating
* Fertile women who do not use relevant anticonception

outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: 1 hour before operation until 21 hours after roperation

outcomeMeasures.title: E'/A'-Ratio (Unitless)
outcomeMeasures.description: Tissue Doppler transthoracic echocardiography: Ratio between tissue velocities at the mitral plan during early (E) diastole and late (A) diastole. Index of diastolic function.
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: 21 hours after operation until 96 hours after operation

outcomeMeasures.title: E'/A'-Ratio (Unitless)
outcomeMeasures.description: Tissue Doppler transthoracic echocardiography: Ratio between tissue velocities at the mitral plan during early (E) diastole and late (A) diastole. Index of diastolic function.
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: 96 hours after operation until 6 months after operation

outcomeMeasures.title: Isovolumetric Relaxation Time (IVRT) (s)
outcomeMeasures.description: Transthoracic measure of the time from aortic valve closure until mitral valve opening. A measure of diastolic function
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: 1 hour before operation until 21 hours after operation

outcomeMeasures.title: Isovolumetric Relaxation Time (IVRT) (s)
outcomeMeasures.description: Transthoracic measure of the time from aortic valve closure until mitral valve opening. A measure of diastolic function
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: 21 hours after operation until 96 hours after operation

outcomeMeasures.title: Isovolumetric Relaxation Time (IVRT) (s)
outcomeMeasures.description: Transthoracic measure of the time from aortic valve closure until mitral valve opening. A measure of diastolic function
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: 96 hours after operation until 6 months after operation

outcomeMeasures.title: Ejection Fraction (Per Cent)
outcomeMeasures.description: Transeosophageal echocardiography: Measure of systolic function
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: End of operation until approx. 4 hours after operation

outcomeMeasures.title: Isovolumetric Relaxation Time (IVRT) (s)
outcomeMeasures.description: Transeosophageal echocardiography: Time from closure of aortic valve to opening of mitral valve. Measure of diastolic function.
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: End of operation until approx. 4 hours after operation

outcomeMeasures.title: Cardiac Index (l/Min/m2)
outcomeMeasures.description: Invasive measurement measuring the cardiac output divided by calculated body surface area (DuBois formula)
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: 1 hour before operation until start of operation

outcomeMeasures.title: Cardiac Index (l/Min/m2)
outcomeMeasures.description: Invasive measurement measuring the cardiac output divided by calculated body surface area (DuBois formula)
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: Start of operation until end of operation, approximately 3 hours

outcomeMeasures.title: Cardiac Index (l/Min/m2)
outcomeMeasures.description: Invasive measurement measuring the cardiac output divided by calculated body surface area (DuBois formula)
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: End of operation operation until approx. 4 hours after operation

outcomeMeasures.title: Cardiac Index (l/Min/m2)
outcomeMeasures.description: Invasive measurement measuring the cardiac output divided by calculated body surface area (DuBois formula)
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: 4 hours after operation until 21 hours after operation

outcomeMeasures.title: Inflammatory Parameters
outcomeMeasures.description: Blood sample values of pro- and antiinflammatory mediators
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: 4 hours before operation until 21 hours after operation

outcomeMeasures.title: Inflammatory Parameters
outcomeMeasures.description: Blood sample values of pro- and antiinflammatory mediators
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: 21 hours after operation until 96 hours after operation

outcomeMeasures.title: E/A-ratio (Transoesophageal)
outcomeMeasures.description: Transoesophageal echocardiographic measure of diastolic heart function
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: from start of operation until end of operation, approximately 3 hours

outcomeMeasures.title: E/A-ratio (Transoesophageal)
outcomeMeasures.description: Transoesophageal echocardiographic measure of diastolic heart function
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: from end of operation until approximately 4 hours after operation

outcomeMeasures.title: Urine Clearance
outcomeMeasures.description: Urine analysis. Measure of kidney function.
outcomeMeasures.timeFrame: from start of operation until 24 hours after operation

eventGroups.title: Levosimendan
eventGroups.description:
infusion 0,1ug/kg/min for duration of ca. 4 hours prior to operation and until the end of operation

levosimendan: Intravenous infusion, 0,1ug/kg/min, duration 4 hours prior to operation and until the end of operation.

eventGroups.title: Placebo
eventGroups.description:
Identical placebo

placebo drug: Intravenous infusion, colour identical to levosimendan
